subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! The letter which thou didst address to Áqá Siyyid Taqí was perused. From its contents [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء مکتوبی که باقا سید تقی مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گشت از مضمون و
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @importance of prayer, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause
